character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Injured during a fight with Black Dog, later suffers a stroke and is treated by Doctor Livesey.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Assists in the aftermath of the fight, fetches rum, and interacts with the captain and doctor.

character_dossiers.name: Doctor Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Treats the captain for a stroke, performs a bloodletting procedure, and advises him.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Helps tend to the captain and assists Jim during the crisis.

character_dossiers.name: my father
character_dossiers.biography: Sick and involved in the aftermath of the events.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A fugitive pursued by the captain, injured during a confrontation.

character_dossiers.name: old Flint
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in the captain's dialogue as a past figure associated with the black spot.

character_dossiers.name: Billy Bones
character_dossiers.biography: Referred to by the doctor as the captain's alias, denied by the captain.
